title: Iran's supreme leader killed in US-Israel airstrike | 7NEWS
description: The mission was clear – the American led annihilation of Iran's terrorist regime – which has spilled blood across the world for almost half a century.  The nation's Supreme Leader is dead, killed in his fortress, by US and Israeli airstrikes codenamed "Operation Epic Fury".  But Iran is retaliating, unleashing attacks across the Middle East – Israel, the United Arab Emirates, Qatar and Kuwait among those bombed.  It immediately shut down the region's airspace, sending global airline travel into chaos.  Right now, much of the Middle East is burning. title: Travel chaos throughout Australia
description: Middle Eastern airspace closures have stranded 29 aircraft from Emirates, Qatar Airways and Etihad at Australian airports, forcing four Virgin Australia flights to turn back mid-journey after up to 10 hours in the air.    Passengers at airports across Sydney, Melbourne and Adelaide face cancellations and accommodation shortages, with some transit passengers requiring emergency Australian visas.    The Australian government has upgraded travel warnings to 'do not travel' for Dubai, Doha and Abu Dhabi following an incident at Dubai Airport that injured four people.   #Sydney #Australia #airports #Iran

title: Iranians mourn Supreme Leader Khamenei
description: Iranians gathered at a prominent mosque after Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei was killed in his office on Saturday morning during a US-Israeli attack.   Forty days of public mourning and seven days of public holiday were declared in Khamenei’s memory, state media reported.   #iran #khamenei #us #israel

title: Who might be Iran's next leader?
description: Iran's National Security Adviser Ali Larijani is convening a leadership meeting to begin the process of appointing a new Supreme Leader following the assassination of Ayatollah Khamenei. #Iran #supremeleader #khamenei

title: At least 57 school girls killed in US-Israel strike on Iran
description: At least 57 girls were killed and dozens more wounded in a strike on a school during an offensive launched by the US and Israel on February 28, according to Iran’s state news agency. #Iran #US #Israel

title: Several killed as pro-Iranian protesters storm US consulate in Karachi
description: Several protesters were killed, and many were injured when hundreds of pro-Iranians stormed the US Consulate in Pakistan, after the death of Iranian Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. #Pakistan #USconsulate #Karachi
